title: Trump Remarks on U.S.S. Cole and Iran Raise Questions in Guantánamo Case
summary_full: Prosecutors have offered up no evidence supporting a link that the president claimed between Iran and the attack in Yemen in 2000, defense lawyers say.
summary_public: Prosecutors have offered up no evidence supporting a link that the president claimed between Iran and the attack in Yemen in 2000, defense lawyers say.
